tier_definitions.0: read-only / documentation / report-only — no council, no receipt
tier_definitions.1: generated artifacts / memory summaries / append-only logs — no council, no receipt
tier_definitions.2: low-risk additive code/test files outside core runtime — council + receipt required
tier_definitions.3: medium-risk code edits — council + receipt + 2-of-3 quorum
tier_definitions.4: high-risk core edits (worker.py, aider_bridge.py, luna_guardian.py, etc.) — council + receipt + unanimous quorum
